## 📖 About

   A simple mod that allows you to be able to control the speed & tick speed of the game.  
   
   ![gif](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/3jm7pp2r8ic4ha94v14sb/Untitled-video-Made-with-Clipchamp-_13_.gif?rlkey=uvsp52eipehazzr6yv8rck9dj&st=ss1y0bbk&dl=1)
      

  
    
## 📖 How It works
    
Using the command: /speed [integer] you can change the speed/tick speed of the game!
    
## ⚙️ Configuration Options
    
*   ChangeTickSpeedOnly = true/false \[default: false\]
*   ChangeGameSpeedOnly = true/false \[default: false\]
*   Default Speed = number \[default: 20\]
